mapper.select: SELECT su.id, su.phone, su.status, GROUP_CONCAT(DISTINCT r.role_name) as roleNames, /** 核心逻辑：根据关联到的扩展表取名字，优先级可自定义，这里假设医生和用户互斥 */ IFNULL(d.username, IFNULL(u.name, '管理员')) as name, u.last_login_time -- 新增：用户最后登录时间 FROM sys_user su LEFT JOIN sys_user_role sur ON su.id = sur.user_id LEFT JOIN sys_role r ON sur.role_id = r.id LEFT JOIN user u ON su.id = u.id /** 注意：这里假设外键是 u.sys_user_id，请替换为实际字段 -->*/ LEFT JOIN doctor d ON su.id = d.id /** 同上，替换为实际关联字段 */ WHERE su.phone = #{phone} GROUP BY su.id, su.phone, su.status, u.name
